description: Complete the post-meeting workflow in SuiteCRM for the 'Global Widgets - Q3 Roadmap Sync' meeting. Update the meeting status to 'Held'. Create a related Note with the subject 'Q3 Roadmap Sync - Minutes' and body 'Discussed feature timeline. Client approved the proposed rollout schedule.' Additionally, create a related Task with the subject 'Draft Q3 SLA Addendum', status 'Not Started', and priority 'High'. Ensure all new records are correctly linked to the parent meeting.
